title: CADE: a reference-free coefficient-sensitivity ranking workflow for bulk differential expression
description: CADE is a reference-free coefficient-sensitivity ranking workflow for bulk transcriptomic studies where cell-composition shifts are expected but disease-matched single-cell references are unavailable. The software derives marker-based relative composition weights, fits paired unadjusted and composition-adjusted limma models, and reports Composition Confounding Index outputs with signed labels, denominator handling, bootstrap rank stability, permutation calibration, threshold scans, and ILR coordinate sensitivity.

creators.name: Guo, Xutao
creators.affiliation: Department of Hematology, Nanfang Hospital, Southern Medical University
